_notes: Multi-word terms stored without space (e.g. DEEPLEARNING). breakAfter = letter count of the first word, used to draw the visual break marker. 'subject' is an additive tag (LLM, Prompt Engineering, Machine Learning, NLP, AI Ethics & Safety, AI Agents) for a future topic selector — 'category' (general/ml/llm) is kept as-is for now.
